text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I'm really feeling the benefits. I definitely
think I've improved.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is to enter the autumn Tenno
Sho and―

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Can you not steal my lines?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We'll keep tweaking things right up until the last
second. It's Vodka we're going up against, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to make sure I'm at the top of my game so I
can't possibly lose!
